title: The Power of Creation and Naming
summary: “And God called the light Day, and the darkness he called Night. And the evening and the morning were the first day.” Genesis 1:5 “And God called the firmament Heaven. And the evening and the morning were the second day.” Genesis 1:8 “Male and female created he them; and blessed them, and called their name Adam, in the day when they were created.” Genesis 5:2
